CreateNotifyTemplate.name: Notification template name, duplicates allowed
CreateNotifyTemplate.silencePeriods: List of silence periods during which notifications will not be triggered
CreateNotifyTemplate.receivers: List of notification receivers; empty means the template is not bound to any specific member
CreateNotifyTemplate.receivers.id: Receiver ID, user or user group ID
CreateNotifyTemplate.receivers.name: Receiver name
CreateNotifyTemplate.receivers.receiverType: Type of the notification receiver, valid values: USER / USER_GROUP
CreateNotifyTemplate.receivers.channels: List of notification channels, valid values: SMS / EMAIL / PHONE
